---
title: "About"
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/digital-nomad-cheng
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/yuhua-cheng-nomad/
---

## About Me

I am a machine learning engineer with a focus on computer vision and efficient machine learning solutions on edge devices, based in Sweden.

I mainly work with image-related tasks — from image signal processing, to object detection/tracking/segmentation, and face recognition systems.

## Interests

- 🔭 Deep learning model optimization for edge deployment
- 📷 Computer vision & image processing
- ⚡ ML compilation & efficient inference
- 🧠 Vision Transformers & attention mechanisms

## How I Help

- **Edge ML Optimization & Deployment**: Bringing complex deep learning models to resource-constrained devices.
- **Computer Vision System Development**: Designing robust architectures for object detection, tracking, and segmentation.
- **Custom AI Solution Architecture**: Crafting end-to-end pipelines tailored to specific tasks and hardware.
- **Model Compilation & Inference Acceleration**: Maximizing throughput and minimizing latency for real-time applications.
